name: Ambulatory Care Prior Authorization Compliance Checker
description: Ambulatory Care Prior Authorization Compliance Checker forecasts claims history and ingests problem lists; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via Telemedicine Platform to lower readmissions.

steps.name: Signal Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize admission notes from LIS; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Plan
steps.description: Execute plan phase for the Plan-Execute pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Execute
steps.description: Execute execute phase for the Plan-Execute pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Plan Drafting
steps.description: Plan Drafting across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Risk Scoring
steps.description: Risk Scoring across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Triage
steps.description: Triage across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Outcome Measurement
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to HIE; return response JSON for the client.
